channel.title: 简报 Jae Daily · 2026年03月16日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: 五角大楼AI军事应用与克劳德之战

item.title: 美马贸易协议陷“无效”罗生门
item.description: Malaysia’s government has been forced onto the defensive over its much-touted tariff deal with the United States, after a minister walked back an earlier claim that the agreement had been rendered “nu

item.title: PostgreSQL终端客户端pgtui发布

item.title: 加拿大养老基金受私募低迷冲击
item.description: Rising interest rates bring prolonged downturn to the buyout industry

item.title: 乌克兰打响金融前线保卫战
item.description: The war-torn country is battling to secure crucial funding from the IMF and EU, as well as putting up taxes.

item.title: 股指期货微升，市场关注霍尔木兹
item.description: US stock futures edged higher after several tankers managed to traverse the Strait of Hormuz on the weekend, raising hopes that the key oil transport artery could reopen.

item.title: 美国团体推动英国新一代反堕胎运动
item.description: The killing of Charlie Kirk galvanised a transatlantic campaign against abortion. But will it succeed in shifting Britain's pro-choice consensus?

item.title: 报告称朝鲜涉俄乌冲突获利144亿美元
item.description: SEOUL, March 16 (Yonhap) -- North Korea is estimated to have earned up to US$14....

item.title: 以军启动黎巴嫩南部地面行动
item.description: Israeli army says its forces are targeting key locations in southern Lebanon, aiming to expand forward defence zones.

item.title: 无醇啤酒与宠物美容纳入通胀测算
item.description: Houmous and motorhomes are also added to the basket of goods and services used to chart the rising cost of living.

item.title: 斯塔默将推取暖油费支持计划
item.description: Households have faced a sharp rise in the cost of heating oil since the outbreak of the US-Israeli war with Iran.

item.title: 钢铁厂日耗130万英镑运营
item.description: The government spent £377m to keep British Steel's Scunthorpe site operating, according to a report.

item.title: 英国清洁能源目标推进受阻
item.description: Our economy remains highly fossil fuel-dependent partly because we are not electrifying in the desired way

item.title: 内塔尼亚胡对手竞相对伊朗示强
item.description: Israel’s opposition parties criticise PM’s management of war even if they express strong support for offensive

item.title: 战争施压 铝价冲高回落
item.description: Aluminum slipped as European stock markets fell, with the metal giving up gains seen after a major Middle Eastern smelter closed almost a fifth of capacity because of the war in Iran.

item.title: 工业股领涨标普500 国防与AI需求提振盈利
item.description: US industrial companies delivered the biggest earnings surprise of any sector last quarter, with profits topping estimates as defense demand, commercial aerospace and artificial intelligence-related c

item.title: 安湃声26亿美元收购GN助听业务
item.description: Amplifon SpA agreed to buy the hearing-aid business of GN Store Nord A/S in a deal valued at 17 billion Danish kroner ($2.6 billion), a price that sent shares of the seller soaring the most on record.

item.title: 散户数十亿资金撤离私募信贷金矿
item.description: Flood of redemptions threatens to stall one of Wall Street’s most important sources of growth

item.title: 企业雇失业青年将获补贴
item.description: Payments of £3,000 for each 18-24 year old given a job are among proposals to tackle youth unemployment being announced later.

item.title: 米利班德：必要时干预能源账单
item.description: Oil and gas prices have surged due to the US-Israel war in Iran, with fears over the cost of living.

item.title: 香港高级警司否认非礼案指控
item.description: A senior Hong Kong police officer has denied molesting a government clerk at the force’s headquarters more than a year ago. Senior Superintendent Ian Chow Ngai-kong, 50, on Monday stood trial at Easte

item.title: 韩美联演期间大将视察作战司令部

item.title: 亚马逊春季科技促销精选（2026）
item.description: This sale spans almost an entire week, and it’s full of fake “deals.” We hunted to find truly good prices on gear we’ve tested.

item.title: 乌反对派领袖称逃亡保命
item.description: Bobi Wine says from an undisclosed location: "It was clear that the regime wanted to eliminate me."

item.title: 以军称 synagogue袭击者兄弟系真主党指挥官
item.description: US officials previously said the man accused of ramming a truck full of explosives into a synagogue had recently lost family in Lebanon.

item.title: 纸币、河狸与英国式反弹
item.description: Politicians are furious Churchill will be replaced on banknotes. The RSPCA wants rats and pigeons to feature.

item.title: AI游戏困局溯源
item.description: When winning depends on intuiting a mathematical function, AIs come up short.

item.title: 伊朗将遭炸女校改建反美纪念馆
item.description: Iran plans to convert the girls’ school that was bombed on the first day of the war into a museum commemorating the nearly 200 victims of the strike. “This school is a living document of the Americans

item.title: 海湾遭伊朗袭击特朗普炫耀战果
item.description: On the 17th day of the war, a ceasfire looks like a far off hope. While Donald Trump boasts of the success of the American strikes, which are supposed to have virtually destroyed Iranian military capa

item.title: 斯特里普德奥斯卡致敬"牛仔哲人"
item.description: The actress and singer performed the song ‘The Way We Were’ at the ‘In Memoriam’ segment of the Academy Awards ceremony
